mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, relation, is_primary, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id = #{id} AND delmark = 1

SELECT id, real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, relation, is_primary, delmark, create_time, update_time FROM patient WHERE id_card = #{idCard} AND delmark = 1

SELECT p.id, p.real_name, p.id_card, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.phone, p.avatar, p.home_address, p.allergy_history, p.relation, p.is_primary, p.delmark, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM patient p INNER JOIN user_patient_managed upm ON p.id = upm.patient_id WHERE upm.user_id = #{userId} AND p.delmark = 1 ORDER BY p.is_primary DESC, p.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (real_name, id_card, gender, birthdate, phone, avatar, home_address, allergy_history, relation, is_primary, delmark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{realName}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{birthdate}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{homeAddress}, #{allergyHistory}, #{relation}, #{isPrimary}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET real_name = #{realName}, id_card = #{idCard}, gender = #{gender}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, home_address = #{homeAddress}, allergy_history = #{allergyHistory}, relation = #{relation}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE patient SET delmark = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
